description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow set within a fenced rectangular plot featuring a large green lawn and several outbuildings. The main structure has a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout with multiple rooms visible from above, including what appears to be a central living area and adjacent spaces. The property includes a detached garage with a driveway and a red car parked outside, as well as a secondary shed or utility building. The exterior walls are a mix of white and dark gray, with large windows distributed along the sides, and a small covered entryway is visible. The surrounding fence is white and semi-transparent, enclosing the entire property. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with a focus on open outdoor space and clear separation between the main house and auxiliary structures.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced yard, accompanied by a detached garage and utility shed. The property features a spacious green lawn and a minimalist architectural style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main bungalow, fenced yard, and detached garage with a red car; the main entrance and lawn are prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure of the bungalow, the arrangement of windows, and the proximity of the garage and shed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the full extent of the fenced yard, and the garage with its driveway and car.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the green lawn, side windows, and the spatial relationship between the main house and outbuildings.
